items.title: List shared config (agents, skills, CLAUDE.md)
items.expected: Envelope with agents[], skills[], and the CLAUDE.md entry
items.evidence: Verified live: GET /api/agent-config returned { agents: [], skills: [], claudemd: { type: 'claudemd', name: 'CLAUDE.md' } }.

items.title: Create/edit a subagent and a skill; save writes valid frontmatter
items.expected: Files written under .claude/agents and .claude/skills with valid YAML frontmatter; re-read round-trips
items.notes: gray-matter parse/serialize + required-field validation implemented (verified in code). Exercise via the UI on the operator machine.

items.title: Each save produces one commit scoped to the file, authored by the profile
steps: 1. After a save, run git log -1 --stat in the DevEasy repo
items.expected: One commit naming the changed file, authored 'LagDave <laggy80@gmail.com>'; no push
items.notes: GitCommitService stages only the changed file and commits with -c user.name/-c user.email; no push/amend/force (verified in code). Verify alongside T2.

items.title: Path guard rejects writes outside the config tree
items.expected: Rejected with a typed error; nothing written outside .claude/agents|skills or CLAUDE.md
items.notes: Path guard implemented (rejects names with / \ .. and resolves inside the whitelisted dirs). Quick to verify with a crafted request.
